wallet.title: WALLET
wallet.noTransactions: No transactions yet. Buy coins to get started!
wallet.step1Desc: Purchase coin packs or earn 30/month with Pro
wallet.step2Desc: Use coins to enter prediction leagues and compete
wallet.step3Desc: Top predictors win the prize pool (minus 10% fee)
wallet.step4Desc: Exchange coins for real gift cards
wallet.disclaimer: Kinetic is a skill-based prediction game for entertainment purposes. Coins are virtual credits with no cash value. Not a gambling service.
wallet.welcomeBody:
Coins are virtual credits used within Kinetic for:

• Entering prediction leagues (skill-based competitions)
• Redeeming promotional gift card rewards

Coins have no real-world cash value and cannot be transferred to other users or converted to currency.
